name: pratyabhijna-creative-engine
description: Pratyabhijna x Active Inference creative-cognition engine v0.3. Adds a clean Haiku CLI substrate (no API key) via subprocess flag isolation + scrubbed HOME + IntegrityProbe, an event-gated causal vimarsa with always-shadow revision (H8 always measurable), full active-inference uplift on the cascade causal path (non-degenerate BMR delta_F via aspect-conditioned reductions, Hopfield in apohana, plumbed cit_temperature, per-item free-energy budget), and a budget-matched four-arm benchmark (haiku_bare, haiku_cascade, haiku_bare_2K_scorer, haiku_generic_revise_2pass). Ships 18 MCP tools (16 v0.2 + haiku_clean_substrate_probe + hopfield_state), 5 skills, 5 agents, 5 slash commands, and 3 lifecycle hooks.
